parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Simon Domain Model

class GameActivity {
  pattern
  userInput
  speed
}

class ScoresActivity {
  highScore
}

class SettingsActivity {
  difficulty
}

class simon
class buttonPress
class getHighScore
class Beginner
class Intermediate
class Advanced

GameActivity -right- ScoresActivity : update highest\n> sequence count
GameActivity -- SettingsActivity : > view
GameActivity *-- "1" simon : contains >
GameActivity *-- "1" buttonPress : < contains

ScoresActivity *-- "1" getHighScore : contains >

SettingsActivity *-- "1" Beginner : > contains
SettingsActivity *-- "1" Intermediate : contains >
SettingsActivity *-- "1" Advanced : < contains

@enduml
```
